author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 6760855, docs only. Main README: +--threads, +-p/--pipe in CLI ref; +atomic/record_undo in JSON docs; architecture table corrected to five crates incl. the facade. ripsed-core README: execution paths, prescreen, counts, ranges, metadata invariant, facade pointer. ripsed-fs README: dead PID-staleness claim removed (flock since 0.2.8), encoding-aware I/O + UTF-16 binary-detection documented. ripsed-json README: phantom 64MiB limit removed, modern request example (count/multiline/range/atomic/record_undo), gen-schema pointer. 25 suites still green.
